name: revolut-x
description: Revolut X CLI skills only — auth, market, account, trading, monitoring, Telegram, and grid trading via the revx CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Crypto trading, market data, monitoring, and grid bots via the revx CLI
interface.longDescription: Revolut X for Codex provides skills that teach the assistant to use the revx CLI for the Revolut X crypto exchange — auth setup, market data, account queries, order placement, live monitoring, and grid trading strategies.
defaultPrompt: Help me check my Revolut X balances or place a trade using the revx CLI
